_comment: RECONSTRUCTED from the locked taxonomy decisions: rings gate ambition; derivation gates admissibility. This file, JCS-canonicalized and SHA-256 hashed, is enumerated in the genesis record. Changes after genesis are governance records. FOUNDER TO RE-REVIEW before hashing.

defined_convention.notes: e.g. standard gravity, standard atmosphere; external-standard adoptions (ISO 3166, Unicode) are RING-2 PENDING and require an adoption governance record

statistical_analysis.notes: cannot enter review until the Ring 2 governance record exists

documentary_evidence.notes: cannot enter review until the Ring 2 governance record exists

institutional_declaration.notes: pending a dedicated evidence framework; time-bound status lives in the unsealed attestation layer
